Tests the Math.atan2 function with negative zero inputs to verify it returns -Math.PI.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test assertion that checks the behavior of the `Math.atan2` function in JavaScript. It verifies that when both arguments are `-0`, the function returns `-Math.PI`. This test ensures that the `Math.atan2` function correctly handles edge cases involving negative zero inputs, which is important for mathematical accuracy in trigonometric calculations. The code is a single assertion and provides narrow functionality focused on validating a specific mathematical operation.
